title: Bordro Trendleri
description: 24 aylık bordro trendi, maliyet yapısı şelale, departman ve şirket bazlı maliyet izleme.

trend.where: PUANTAJ_ID IN (SELECT PUANTAJ_ID FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] WHERE SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 2)

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT (cur_total - prev_total) / NULLIF(prev_total, 0) AS change_pct FROM (SELECT SUM(SALARY) AS cur_total FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1) c CROSS JOIN (SELECT SUM(SALARY) AS prev_total FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 2) p) mom_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT (cur_total - prev_total) / NULLIF(prev_total, 0) AS change_pct FROM (SELECT SUM(SALARY) AS cur_total FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1) c CROSS JOIN (SELECT SUM(SALARY) AS prev_total FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1) p) yoy_sub

aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

aggregate.select: AVG(CASE WHEN SALARY > 0 THEN NET_UCRET / SALARY ELSE NULL END)
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

aggregate.select: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2) AS label, SUM(TOTAL_SALARY) AS value, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value2
aggregate.where: (ep.SAL_YEAR >= YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2) AND NOT (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON >= MONTH(GETDATE()))
aggregate.groupBy: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2)

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT 'Brüt Maaş' AS label, SUM(SALARY) AS value, 1 AS sort_order FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'SGK İşveren', SUM(SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI), 2 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'SGK İşçi', SUM(SSK_ISCI_HISSESI), 3 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'İşsizlik', SUM(ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISCI_HISSESI), 4 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Gelir Vergisi', SUM(GELIR_VERGISI), 5 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Damga Vergisi', SUM(DAMGA_VERGISI), 6 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Fazla Mesai', SUM(EXT_SALARY), 7 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Net Ücret', SUM(NET_UCRET), 8 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1) cost_item

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, SUM(SALARY + SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI) AS value
CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2) AS label, SUM(EXT_SALARY) AS value
aggregate.where: (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) OR (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 AND ep.SAL_MON >= MONTH(GETDATE()))) AND ep.SAL_MON <= CASE WHEN ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN MONTH(GETDATE())-1 ELSE 12 END
aggregate.groupBy: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2)

aggregate.select: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2) AS label, SUM(SALARY + SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID), 0) AS value
aggregate.where: (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) OR (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 AND ep.SAL_MON >= MONTH(GETDATE()))) AND ep.SAL_MON <= CASE WHEN ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN MONTH(GETDATE())-1 ELSE 12 END AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.groupBy: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2)

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT 'SGK İşveren' AS label, SUM(SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI) AS value, 1 AS sort_order FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'SGK İşçi', SUM(SSK_ISCI_HISSESI), 2 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Gelir Vergisi', SUM(GELIR_VERGISI), 3 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Damga Vergisi', SUM(DAMGA_VERGISI), 4 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'İşsizlik Sigortası', SUM(ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISCI_HISSESI), 5 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1) tax_item

aggregate.select: collar_sub.label, MAX(collar_sub.value) AS value, MAX(collar_sub.cnt) AS value2
aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT CASE epos.COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, SUM(epr.SALARY + epr.SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + epr.ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI) AS value, COUNT(DISTINCT epr.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS cnt FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = epr.EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1 WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 GROUP BY CASE epos.COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END) collar_sub

collarType.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1
